steps.title: Express h using k
steps.content:
From the first equation, solve for $h$ and substitute the expression for $j$:
$$h=\frac{0.28}{0.35}j$$
$$h=0.8(0.55k)$$

steps.title: Convert to a percent
steps.content:
Multiply the factors:
$$0.8(0.55)=0.44$$
So $h$ is $44\%$ of $k$. The answer is 44.
